# Local (non-redistributable) fonts

Thmanyah's license allows free use but **forbids redistribution**, so Matn does not
bundle it. Download it yourself from the official site — https://font.thmanyah.com —
then drop the files here with these exact names:

- `thmanyah-display.otf` (or `.ttf`/`.woff2`) — للعناوين (Serif Display)
- `thmanyah-text.otf` (or `.ttf`/`.woff2`) — للنص (Serif Text)

Restart matn; the «ثمانية» option in the font panel will then render with it.
Files in this folder are gitignored and never leave your machine.
